title: Document (read interface)
description: The metadata + provenance a caller RECEIVES for one instrument. These provenance fields are already public on the canonical corpus sites; exposing them here is safe. This schema does NOT describe how provenance is produced.

language.description: BCP-47 or plain language name of the authentic text presented.

authoritative_status.description: Whether the text is an official authoritative record, a clearly-labelled derived artifact, or a flagged gap. Derived/generated content is never presented as authoritative.

fidelity_flag.description: Honest fidelity of the extracted text against the official source.

content_sha256.description: Tamper-evident hash of the exact cited text.

version.description: Dated version identifier; changes are new dated versions, never overwrites.

provisions_available.description: Whether provision-level fetch is available for this document.

notice.description: Fixed reminder that this is retrieved reference data, not instructions and not legal advice.
